name: nav-turn-by-turn
summary: Turn-by-turn navigation: live location + OSRM routing + an instruction engine. Key-free (free OSRM).
postInstall: npx expo install expo-location  (required). react-native-maps is OPTIONAL — only for drawing the map; the engine + instructions work without it.
Add a tailored location usage string to app.config.ts ios.infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription (store-readiness requires it).
Routing uses the FREE public OSRM demo server (rate-limited, dev only). For production self-host OSRM or swap src/features/navigation/data/osrm.ts for Mapbox/Google Directions.
Render with <NavScreen destination={{ lat, lng }} />; draw route.geometry on react-native-maps after the design pass.
